title: Ebola cases top 1,000 in Congo; 254 dead as outbreak spreads
summary_full: In the eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, a troubling Ebola outbreak unfolds, with more than 1,000 confirmed cases and 254 deaths reported. The unique Bundibugyo strain presents a significant challenge as there are no licensed vaccines or treatments available. Health authorities are facing difficulties with contact tracing, resulting in thousands of potential contacts remaining untracked.
